sendPlan.attachmentReviewRequired: Please choose exclude or remove for each currently unsupported attachment.
sendPlan.historyAllExcluded: Please confirm: all history attachments will be excluded from this model context.

sendPlan.sendPlanPartial: Some attachments will not be sent. You can continue.
sendPlan.sendPlanWarning: Some attachments have warnings, but sending is allowed.
sendPlan.historyAllExcludedPrompt: Please confirm: all history attachments will be excluded from this model context.

sendPlan.noLocalCopy: This attachment has no available local copy.
sendPlan.fileCopyNotAllowed: Current model or provider does not allow file copy sending.

sendPlan.dfcSelectionUnavailable: The selected converted attachment output is unavailable.
sendPlan.dfcSelectionIncompatible: The selected converted attachment output is incompatible with this send target.

sendPlan.dfcDerivedAssetMissing: The converted attachment output required for this send option is missing.
